task_completion.description: Navigate to the Charge window in iDempiere
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface is visible with the 'Charge' window, tab, or menu item open.
The 'Search Key' input field contains the exact text 'WTF-001'.
The 'Name' input field contains the exact text 'Wire Transfer Fee'.
The 'Description' input field contains 'Bank wire transfer processing fee charged per transaction' (or at least the phrase 'wire transfer').
The 'Charge Amount' input field contains the value '25'.
The 'Tax Category' dropdown or lookup field displays 'Standard'.
A save confirmation message is visible, the save icon is grayed out indicating no unsaved changes, or the new record is visible in a list view.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the record
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is a functional iDempiere ERP system, not a text editor, mockup, or static HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing terminal windows with psql or other database clients executing INSERT statements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Charge record in iDempiere v12 (GardenWorld client). Expected values to verify: Search Key: 'WTF-001', Name: 'Wire Transfer Fee', Charge Amount: '25', Tax Category: 'Standard', and Description must contain 'wire transfer'. The agent must use the iDempiere GUI to complete this task.
